name: Float
description: Cash flow forecasting software that connects to accounting data and models future inflows, outflows, and scenario changes in a rolling forecast.
whyUseIt: Float is valuable when the founder needs a clearer runway view than the accounting platform alone provides. It turns historical finance data into forward-looking cash visibility.
aiCapabilities: Float automates forecast updates from connected accounting systems, surfaces cash runway scenarios, and models the impact of changing revenue or spend assumptions.
